era: Blue-Eyed Soul. E=6 -- FIRST BLUE-EYED SOUL (Genre Stage 108). Soul voice over indie rock. Maker Records. Capitol Hill. 2010-2016. v1.49.349.

location.formative: Capitol Hill indie scene. Soul tradition meets indie rock. Gentrification era (2010-2016).
location.career: Pickwick. 2010-2016. Maker Records. First Blue-Eyed Soul.

members.name: Galen Disston
members.note: Deep baritone. Soul phrasing. Emotional directness. The voice as instrument.

theory_nodes.concept: First Blue-Eyed Soul -- Genre Stage 108. Soul music by white vocalist. Complex racial dynamics. Back-to-back genre firsts: blues rock (107) then blue-eyed soul (108).
examples: Righteous Brothers, Hall & Oates, Amy Winehouse tradition.
Back-to-back: blues rock (107, The Black Tones) then blue-eyed soul (108, Pickwick).
Both involve Black musical traditions through different lenses.
theory_nodes.description: First Blue-Eyed Soul. Genre Stage 108. Back-to-back genre firsts.

genealogy.relationship: Pickwick at 208. First Blue-Eyed Soul in engine.

theory_nodes.concept: The finite band -- 2010-2016. Six years. Burned bright. First definitively inactive band in recent degrees. Closed arc. Capitol Hill gentrification overlap.
examples: First clearly inactive band in recent degrees.
Catalog is finite. Arc is closed.
theory_nodes.description: Finite band. Six years. Closed arc. The neighborhood changed around them.

theory_nodes.concept: Emotional directness in ironic scene -- Chastity Belt (deadpan), Tacocat (humor), Pickwick (passion). Soul tradition demands sincerity. The contrast with the scene is the creative energy.
examples: Soul tradition demands sincerity. Not cool. Passionate.
theory_nodes.description: Emotional directness vs. scene irony. Soul demands sincerity. Passion in ironic territory.

genealogy.relationship: Pickwick at 208. Passion where others use irony.

cross_references.relationship: E=5 to E=6. Lo-fi punk to soul power. Energy returns to maximum after one-degree dip.
Back-to-back genre firsts: blues rock (107) then blue-eyed soul (108). Both Black musical traditions.
Deadpan irony (E=4) vs. emotional directness (E=6). Both Capitol Hill. Opposite delivery modes.
ENERGY MATCH (E=6 + E=6 = 12). Voice fills space: Disston fills venue, Coyote fills valley. Vocal power as spatial illusion.
